name: Salsa Wheel
recipeIngredient: 2 large Ripe avacados, peeled, seeded and into chunks
1/2 cup Sliced green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese, avacados, and salt in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend or process until smooth, scraping down sides once.
3. Spread onto a 12-inch round platter to form a 10-inch circle with a rim.
4. Spoon Territorial House Salsa evenly over avocado mixture.
5. Top with lettuce, tomato, olives, onions, and cheese.
6. Serve with chips. Makes 8-10 servings.
